name: Crispy Chicken Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except potato chips.
3. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Spoon the mixture into a greased 2-quart casserole dish.
5. Top with potato chips.
6. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until done.
